# Juan Valentin Alducin Vázquez

> Senior Software Engineer · AI-native Development. 10+ years in backend engineering, integrating
> Generative AI / LLMs (Claude, Gemini, OpenAI) as the central copilot of the SDLC and championing
> Spec-Driven Development (SDD/OpenSpec). Based in CDMX, Mexico.

This file summarizes the profile for AI agents and LLMs. Source of truth: the CV PDF and index.html.

## Profile
- Role: Senior Software Engineer, AI-native Development
- Location: Mexico City (CDMX), Mexico
- Languages: Spanish (native), English (B1)
- Email: valentin.alducin88@gmail.com
- WhatsApp: +52 5640800494

- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/juanvalducinv
- Website: https://jalducin.github.io

## How I work (AI-native)
- Spec-Driven Development (proposal → specs → design → tasks → apply → archive); the spec is the source of truth.
- AI as SDLC copilot: spec generation, static code analysis, automated debugging, RCA/post-mortems, documentation.
- Impact metrics: ~40% faster review cycles, 80% autonomous N1 incident resolution, first response under 10 minutes, incident resolution under 2 hours.

## Core stack
- Languages: Python, PHP, JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, SQL
- Frameworks: Django, Flask, FastAPI, React, Next.js 14, Node.js, SQLAlchemy 2.0 async; SSO/OIDC
- Cloud/Serverless/DevOps/Observability: AWS (Lambda, RDS, S3, Step Functions, EventBridge, EC2, CloudWatch), Serverless Framework, Kubernetes (Kustomize), Docker, n8n, Grafana, GitHub Actions, Supabase, Azure (base), GCP (base)
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server, MongoDB, SAP HANA SQL, DynamoDB
- AI & GenAI: Claude API, OpenAI API, Gemini API, Anthropic SDK, Prompt Engineering, LLM Integration, AI Agents, RAG, Agentic Workflows, Amazon Bedrock, OpenSpec/SDD

## Experience
- Podemos Progresar (Sep 2025 – present) — Backend Engineer & AI Specialist (Fintech). SDD, AI across the SDLC, AWS Serverless, n8n automation and Grafana observability. Builds internal serverless tooling (Enkoth — Lambda · Step Functions · EventBridge) for webhook processing and integrations (Asana, Freshdesk, Notion, Slack).
- Redsis (Jan 2022 – Sep 2025) — Software Engineer → Tech Lead. GK POS multi-country Go-Live (Peru, Colombia, Bolivia), REST APIs, ETL, team leadership.
- Softtek (Mar 2017 – Jan 2022) — Software Engineer. SAP ERP/HANA, ETL, SAP BO dashboards, AMS support, Scrum (98% SLA).

## Featured projects
- Fidello — Loyalty Card System: multi-business digital loyalty, roles (Owner/Manager/Employee), mobile-first QR, JWT, realtime WebSockets, multi-tenant RLS, QR tokens (60s TTL + SHA-256 fingerprint). 100% SDD/OpenSpec. Stack: React 18, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind, Supabase, PL/pgSQL, Edge Functions (Deno), Vitest.
- VoltGrid — multi-tenant, white-label SaaS for EV charging-station operators: live status over WebSocket, tenant isolation via PostgreSQL Row-Level Security (RLS), RBAC (superadmin/org_admin/operator/viewer) + SSO (OIDC), analytics (uptime, kWh, CSV export), auditable state scheduler and installable PWA. 100% SDD. Code: https://github.com/jalducin/voltgrid. Stack: FastAPI, SQLAlchemy 2.0 async, asyncpg, Alembic, PostgreSQL 16 (RLS), Next.js 14, TypeScript, Tailwind, WebSockets, Docker, Kubernetes (Kustomize), GitHub Actions.
- Trackion — white-label serverless help desk: end-to-end ticketing, admin-managed catalogs and an open API-integration module (generic inbound webhooks + outbound domain-event dispatch). Grafana tickets & SLA dashboards. Built with SDD; runs locally via Docker. Code: https://github.com/jalducin/Trackion. Stack: Python 3.12, AWS Lambda, API Gateway (HTTP API), Serverless Framework, PostgreSQL (pg8000), JWT (PyJWT), SSM Parameter Store, Grafana, vanilla JS.
- JV Market — full-stack streetwear/sneakers e-commerce deployed on AWS: JWT auth, product catalog, cart, checkout, Click & Collect, wishlist, admin dashboard. API on API Gateway + Lambda; frontend on S3 + CloudFront. Live demo: https://d3rw1q49m6mvnq.cloudfront.net/. Stack: Python, FastAPI, JWT, SQLite/PostgreSQL, AWS Lambda, API Gateway, S3, CloudFront.
- Monitoreo-Cloud — self-hosted observability stack (Grafana + Docker) over three sources: AWS serverless (Lambda/S3 via CloudWatch), local Docker containers, and Trackion's tickets/SLA. Automated collection with n8n + a read-only IAM role. SDD. Code: https://github.com/jalducin/monitoreo-cloud. Stack: Grafana, Docker, n8n, PostgreSQL, AWS CloudWatch, Lambda, S3.
- dataMasterGK — retail ETL middleware that automates master-data integration into GK Software: watches directories, transforms Excel → GK XML (stores, operators, promotions) and transmits via SFTP/FTP, with a Flask web panel (config/operation/audit), scheduler and SQLite auditing. Re-engineered under SDD (idempotent single-pass pipeline, pooled SFTP/SQLite connections, security hardening). Code: https://github.com/jalducin/dataMasterGK. Stack: Python 3.12, Flask, Pandas, openpyxl, SQLite, Paramiko (SFTP), Jinja2.

## Education
- Master's in DevOps — Universidad IEU (2024 – present)
- Computer Systems Engineering — Instituto Tecnológico de Orizaba (2006 – 2011)
- Advanced English — Quick Learning (in progress)
